requests.primary_objective: evaluate progression-free survival with experimental PD-L1 inhibitor versus chemotherapy
requests.target_population: adults with locally advanced or metastatic NSCLC, ECOG performance status 0-1, PD-L1 TPS at least 1 percent
requests.instructions: Draft endpoints (PFS primary, OS secondary), eligibility, and 12-month visit schedule.

regulatory_risks: surrogate endpoint in phase 3 requires health authority alignment

requests.primary_objective: demonstrate superiority of once-weekly GLP-1 receptor agonist on HbA1c reduction at 24 weeks versus placebo
requests.target_population: adults 18 to 75 years with type 2 diabetes mellitus, HbA1c 7.5 to 11 percent on stable metformin monotherapy
requests.instructions: Draft HbA1c primary endpoint, cardiovascular safety secondary endpoints, eligibility per FDA guidance, and 52-week schedule.

requests.indication: heart failure with reduced ejection fraction
requests.primary_objective: evaluate MACE composite endpoint (cardiovascular death, hospitalization for heart failure, urgent heart failure visit)
requests.target_population: adults 40 years or older with heart failure with reduced ejection fraction (ejection fraction 40 percent or less), NYHA class II-III, optimal background therapy
requests.instructions: Draft MACE primary endpoint, all-cause mortality and Kansas City Cardiomyopathy Questionnaire secondary endpoints, eligibility per ESC/ACC heart failure guidelines, and 36-month event-driven schedule.

regulatory_risks: cardiovascular endpoint requires FDA/EMA alignment on MACE definition
